message:
chore(lock): refresh Cargo.lock — split itertools into 0.13 + 0.14

Regenerates Cargo.lock to reflect the current resolver output of
the workspace. No Cargo.toml changes accompany this; the lock is
catching up to state already implied by the dependency graph after
recent crate additions elsewhere in the workspace.

Concrete lockfile changes:

- New `itertools 0.14.0` record added with the registry source and
  checksum `2b192c782037fadd9cfa75548310488aabdbf3d2da73885b31bd0abd03351285`
  and its single `either` dependency. This lands version 0.14 as a
  distinct entry alongside the existing `itertools 0.13.0` record.
- The existing `itertools 0.13.0` record is kept (checksum and
  dependency list unchanged); its consumers are renamed from the
  bare `itertools` form to the explicit `itertools 0.13.0` form
  wherever Cargo needs to disambiguate:
    - `criterion` dependency block: `itertools` ->
      `itertools 0.13.0`.
    - `criterion-plot` dependency block: `itertools` ->
      `itertools 0.13.0`.
- Downstream record at the bottom (`checksum
  "8a56d757972c98b346a9b766e3f02746cde6dd1cd1d1d563472929fdd74bec4d"`)
  gets its dependency list re-pinned to the `itertools 0.13.0`
  form for the same disambiguation reason.

No runtime behavior change expected; this is lockfile hygiene only.
The two itertools major versions coexist cleanly via crate-specific
edition selection, matching how Cargo already handles other
dual-version dependencies in this workspace.

files.patch:
@@ -325,7 +325,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "ciborium",
  "clap",
  "criterion-plot",
- "itertools",
+ "itertools 0.13.0",
  "num-traits",
  "oorandom",
  "page_size",
@@ -345,7 +345,7 @@ source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "d8d80a2f4f5b554395e47b5d8305bc3d27813bacb73493eb1001e8f76dae29ea"
 dependencies = [
  "cast",
- "itertools",
+ "itertools 0.13.0",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -923,6 +923,15 @@ dependencies = [
  "either",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "itertools"
+version = "0.14.0"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "2b192c782037fadd9cfa75548310488aabdbf3d2da73885b31bd0abd03351285"
+dependencies = [
+ "either",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "itoa"
 version = "1.0.18"
@@ -1206,7 +1215,7 @@ source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "8a56d757972c98b346a9b766e3f02746cde6dd1cd1d1d563472929fdd74bec4d"
 dependencies = [
  "anyhow",
- "itertools",
+ "itertools 0.14.0",
  "proc-macro2",
  "quote",
  "syn",
